required_fields_when_not_draft.name: required_fields_when_not_draft
required_fields_when_not_draft.value:
(status = 'DRAFT') OR (
      "disbursements"."fund_cluster" IS NOT NULL AND
      "disbursements"."tracking_reference" IS NOT NULL AND
      "disbursements"."particulars" IS NOT NULL AND
      "disbursements"."date" IS NOT NULL AND
      "disbursements"."transaction_type" IS NOT NULL AND
      "disbursements"."amount" IS NOT NULL
    )

only_one_detail_reference.name: only_one_detail_reference
only_one_detail_reference.value: ("modification_details"."allotment_details_id" IS NOT NULL AND "modification_details"."sub_aro_details_id" IS NULL) OR ("modification_details"."allotment_details_id" IS NULL AND "modification_details"."sub_aro_details_id" IS NOT NULL)

only_one_reference.name: only_one_reference
only_one_reference.value: ("modifications"."allotment_id" IS NOT NULL AND "modifications"."sub_aro_id" IS NULL) OR ("modifications"."allotment_id" IS NULL AND "modifications"."sub_aro_id" IS NOT NULL)
